film.title: Police Public
film.overview: Film about the investigation of the death of a young woman.

dialogues.dialogue: What do you want Karuna? I want a child. You've become quite shameless. Go pick a child from an orphanage. Why should I go to an orphanage? I want my own child. Shut up! Along with shame you've also lost your senses.

You've become quite shameless. Go pick a child from an orphanage. Why should I go to an orphanage? I want my own child. Shut up! Along with shame you've also lost your senses. If you were so keen on a child, why did you come.."..barren to this house, huh?" Sir.. I never knew that she would get so much angry with me.
Why didn't you report to the police?! Just to save ourselves from disgrace. And to hide Karuna's shameful act. You've concocted a really interesting story. Trust me, Sir.

Other than that I've nothing to do with that house. Ravi.. get the acid. - Yes, sir. She's proud of her beautiful face....with which she makes the men dance to her tune.....I'll completely disfigure her face! So that she never misuses her beauty! No! I'll tell you!
